mapper:
<<<<<<< HEAD
FROM MENU M LEFT JOIN ROLE_MENU RM ON M.ROLE_ID = RM.ROLE_ID LEFT JOIN ROLE R ON RM.ROLE_CD = R.ROLE_CD AND R.PRJ_ID = #{projectId} LEFT JOIN GRP_ROLE GR ON R.ROLE_CD = GR.ROLE_CD LEFT JOIN GRP G ON GR.GRP_ID = G.ID AND G.PRJ_ID = #{projectId}
AND M.ROLE_ID LIKE '%' || #{permissionKey} || '%'
AND M.ROLE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{permissionName} || '%'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ROLE_MENU RM_DT INNER JOIN ROLE R_DT ON RM_DT.ROLE_CD = R_DT.ROLE_CD AND R_DT.PRJ_ID = #{projectId} WHERE RM_DT.ROLE_ID = M.ROLE_ID AND TRUNC(R_DT.CREATED_ON) >= TO_DATE(#{createdFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ROLE_MENU RM_DT2 INNER JOIN ROLE R_DT2 ON RM_DT2.ROLE_CD = R_DT2.ROLE_CD AND R_DT2.PRJ_ID = #{projectId} WHERE RM_DT2.ROLE_ID = M.ROLE_ID AND TRUNC(R_DT2.CREATED_ON) <= TO_DATE(#{createdTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ) =======
R.PRJ_ID = #{prjId}
AND TO_CHAR(R.ROLE_CD) LIKE '%' || #{permissionKey} || '%'
AND R.ROLE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{permissionName} || '%'
AND TRUNC(R.CREATED_ON) >= TO_DATE(#{createdFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(R.CREATED_ON) <= TO_DATE(#{createdTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') >>>>>>> 5b2578b0144c8d3eb5a483aba11be9bcfdeb31b8
<<<<<<< HEAD
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT M.ROLE_ID
GROUP BY M.ROLE_ID, M.ROLE_NAME ) X
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.*, ROWNUM AS rn FROM ( SELECT M.ROLE_ID AS roleId, M.ROLE_NAME AS roleName, MAX(R.CREATED_ON) AS createdOn, COUNT(DISTINCT G.ID) AS grpCnt
GROUP BY M.ROLE_ID, M.ROLE_NAME ORDER BY M.ROLE_ID ) p WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{limit} ) WHERE rn > #{offset} =======
SELECT R.ROLE_CD AS roleCd, TO_CHAR(R.ROLE_CD) AS id, TO_CHAR(R.ROLE_CD) AS roleId, R.ROLE_NAME AS roleName, R.CREATED_ON AS createdOn, COUNT(DISTINCT G.ID) AS grpCnt FROM ROLE R LEFT JOIN GRP_ROLE GR ON GR.ROLE_CD = R.ROLE_CD LEFT JOIN GRP G ON G.ID = GR.GRP_ID AND G.PRJ_ID = R.PRJ_ID
GROUP BY R.ROLE_CD, R.ROLE_NAME, R.CREATED_ON ORDER BY R.ROLE_CD
SELECT R.ROLE_CD AS roleCd, TO_CHAR(R.ROLE_CD) AS id, TO_CHAR(R.ROLE_CD) AS roleId, R.ROLE_NAME AS roleName, R.CREATED_ON AS createdOn, 0 AS grpCnt FROM ROLE R WHERE R.PRJ_ID = #{prjId} AND R.ROLE_CD = #{roleCd}
SELECT M.ROLE_ID AS id, M.ROLE_ID AS roleId, M.ROLE_NAME AS roleName, M.ROLE_URL AS roleUrl, M.ROLE_TP AS roleTp, M.ROLE_MTH AS roleMth FROM MENU M ORDER BY M.ROLE_TP, M.ROLE_ID
SELECT RM.ROLE_ID FROM ROLE_MENU RM WHERE RM.ROLE_CD = #{roleCd}
SELECT G.ID AS id, G.NAME AS grpName, COUNT(DISTINCT M.USER_ID) AS grpMemberCnt, G.CREATED_ON AS createdOn FROM GRP G LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON M.GRP_ID = G.ID WHERE G.PRJ_ID = #{prjId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM GRP_ROLE GR WHERE GR.GRP_ID = G.ID AND GR.ROLE_CD = #{roleCd} ) GROUP BY G.ID, G.NAME, G.CREATED_ON ORDER BY G.ID >>>>>>> 5b2578b0144c8d3eb5a483aba11be9bcfdeb31b8
